abilities.name: Mantle of Bovemists
abilities.description: @node-warrior #War-Scream# will give you shields around you that blocks incoming damage and break when hit. With @node-pink #Shield-Strike# You can send the broken shields to attack. With @node-pink #Enlightenment#, @node-pink #Shield-Strike# will give teammates in a #16# block range #+1 @node-red Mantle#

abilities.name: Heavenly Trumpet
abilities.description: When casting #[SHIFT] + @node-warrior War-Scream# at #25 Holy Power# you can give #Overhealth# to your teammates. The amount of #Overhealth# is determined by the amount of #Holy Power# consumed up to #100%#. This scales off of your teammate's #Max HP#. So at #100%# it doubles their #HP#.

abilities.name: Blood Pact
abilities.description: When you run out of @icon-mana #Mana#. Your spells will start using your #HP# instead. Be careful as if your health is too low you might have the chance of getting 1-shot.

abilities.name: Sacred Surge
abilities.description: At #25 Holy Power# your @node-warrior #Uppercut# will be enhanced.

abilities.name: Emboldening Cry
abilities.description: @node-warrior #War-Scream# gives an extra #+8%# Damage and #+5%# Resistance to teammates.

abilities.name: Provoke
abilities.description: @node-warrior #War-Scream# Taunts Enemies for #8s#, this is good for protecting your squishier teammates in boss fights and essential to some advanced strategies. #15s# cooldown.

abilities.name: Radiance
abilities.description: @node-warrior #Bash# will provide #+15%# more stats to teammates for #8s# with a few excluded. This has a #15s# cooldown.

abilities.name: Buried Light
abilities.description: @node-warrior #Bash# will provide #+15%# more stats to teammates for #8s# with a few excluded. This has a #15s# cooldown.

abilities.name: Devout Union
abilities.description: This redirects #15%# of the damage taken by teammates to you in a #8# block range.

abilities.name: Aerodynamics
abilities.description: This allows you to steer during your @node-warrior #Charge#

aspects.name: Fallen's Embodiment of Blind Fury
aspects.description: Reduces @node-red #Blood Pact's# HP costs, almost required.
